temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) The video begins with a black screen. White Chinese characters for the production company, '风行网' (Fengxing.com), are displayed in the upper-left corner. (Storyline: This segment serves as the production company's title card, setting the stage for the film.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Silence.)
(00:02-00:05) In a dimly lit, blue-toned office, a woman with her hair in a ponytail leans over a man's shoulder as he works at his desk. She whispers something to him. He turns around, and she quickly covers his mouth with her hand to keep their conversation secret. He then gestures for her to come closer. (Storyline: This scene introduces two characters in a clandestine and secretive interaction, establishing a tense and mysterious atmosphere.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Whispering, secretive. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint office ambiance.)
